testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Frontend-Backend Handshake should complete full WebSocket handshake sequence
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Frontend-Backend Handshake should complete full WebSocket handshake sequence

testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Frontend-Backend Handshake should handle multiple concurrent handshakes
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Frontend-Backend Handshake should handle multiple concurrent handshakes

testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Bidirectional Communication should handle client-to-server messages correctly
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Bidirectional Communication should handle client-to-server messages correctly

testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Bidirectional Communication should handle ping-pong heartbeat mechanism
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Bidirectional Communication should handle ping-pong heartbeat mechanism

testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Error Handling and Recovery should handle malformed JSON messages gracefully
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Error Handling and Recovery should handle malformed JSON messages gracefully

testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Error Handling and Recovery should maintain connection state after temporary network issues
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Error Handling and Recovery should maintain connection state after temporary network issues

testcase.classname: WebSocket Integration Tests Connection Status Verification should report "Connected" status for active WebSocket connections
testcase.name: WebSocket Integration Tests Connection Status Verification should report "Connected" status for active WebSocket connections

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should connect to live backend WebSocket server
testcase.name: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should connect to live backend WebSocket server
testcase.failure: Error: Live connection error: at WebSocket.<anonymous> (/workspaces/agent-feed/tests/websocket/integration/websocket-live-server.test.js:48:18) at WebSocket.emit (node:events:518:28) at emitErrorAndClose (/workspaces/agent-feed/node_modules/ws/lib/websocket.js:1041:13) at ClientRequest.<anonymous> (/workspaces/agent-feed/node_modules/ws/lib/websocket.js:881:5) at ClientRequest.emit (node:events:518:28) at emitErrorEvent (node:_http_client:104:11) at Socket.socketErrorListener (node:_http_client:518:5) at Socket.emit (node:events:518:28) at emitErrorNT (node:internal/streams/destroy:170:8) at emitErrorCloseNT (node:internal/streams/destroy:129:3) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:90:21)

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should complete handshake with live backend server
testcase.name: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should complete handshake with live backend server

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should verify "✅ Connected" status via live server API
testcase.name: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should verify "✅ Connected" status via live server API

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should handle terminal command with live server
testcase.name: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should handle terminal command with live server

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should maintain multiple concurrent connections to live server
testcase.name: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Integration should maintain multiple concurrent connections to live server

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Health and Status should report healthy status from live server
testcase.name: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Health and Status should report healthy status from live server
testcase.failure: FetchError: request to http://localhost:3002/health failed, reason: at ClientRequest.<anonymous> (/workspaces/agent-feed/node_modules/node-fetch/lib/index.js:1501:11) at ClientRequest.emit (node:events:518:28) at emitErrorEvent (node:_http_client:104:11) at Socket.socketErrorListener (node:_http_client:518:5) at Socket.emit (node:events:518:28) at emitErrorNT (node:internal/streams/destroy:170:8) at emitErrorCloseNT (node:internal/streams/destroy:129:3) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:90:21)

testcase.classname: Live WebSocket Integration Tests Live Server Health and Status should show terminal connection stability over time
